commands.review_summary:
This PR adds shared plaintext tool-call parsing/stream normalization, wires the embedded runner to promote allowed serialized tool-call text into structured tool calls, updates provider compat buffering/scrubbing, and expands regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +1896, Tests +2717. Total +4613 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence local reproduction was established in this read-only review. The source path and discussion are enough for medium confidence: current main lacks the embedded-runner promotion wrapper, and the author provided concrete redacted Discord transcripts showing serialized tool-call text leaking instead of executing.
